text.title: DORA Metrics Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules including a `skip-this-methodology` rule. Each pairs a binary check with sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Dashboard MUST measure all 4 DORA metrics (Deploy Frequency, Lead Time, CFR, MTTR) PLUS Reliability/SLO; picking subset rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Each metric MUST have a single source of truth (event source, query, owner); multiple disagreeing sources rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Targets MUST map to elite/high/medium/low DORA bands; opaque % rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Metrics MUST be reviewed at least quarterly with a documented action; review-without-action rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: All 5 metrics MUST be reported together; reporting only the favourable ones rejected.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.

rule.statement: Skip when pre-pipeline OR no leadership buy-in.
rule.rationale: Operational rationale tying the rule to the cited source.
